# It went through. Thank you! 💛

You just funded the three pillars of this project: coffee, poodle treats,
and server costs (there are still no servers - the ghost budget remains
gloriously untouched).

Seriously though: TruePin is built in spare hours, and your donation buys
it a little more of my time. That is the entire economy of this project,
and you just moved it.

---

## Claim your line in the supporters list

Every donor gets a permanent line in
**[SUPPORTERS.md](https://github.com/datysho/truepin/blob/main/SUPPORTERS.md)** -
the project's hall of fame. PayPal doesn't tell me your GitHub handle, so
claiming works like this:

- **[Open a claim issue](https://github.com/datysho/truepin/issues/new?title=I%20donated%20%E2%98%95&body=Name%2C%20handle%20or%20link%20for%20SUPPORTERS.md%3A%0A%0A%28or%20say%20%22anonymous%22%20to%20be%20counted%2C%20not%20named%29)**
  with the name, handle or link you want listed, **or**
- reply to your PayPal receipt email with the same, **or**
- say "anonymous" - you'll be counted, not named.

---

Lucky 🐩 has been notified and has scheduled one (1) celebratory zoomie
in your honor.
